description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the buildstream/buildstream:latest-master-358226704 Docker image with a cache at cache/. Define stages prepare, test, coverage, docs, and upload and a before_script that mounts, shows disk usage, adds a buildstream user, installs quilt, qemu, git-lfs, make via dnf, upgrades pip and installs pytest, pytest-cov, pytest-datafiles<3.0.0, pytest-env, pytest-pep8, pytest-xdist, toml, coverage==4.4.0, pep8, requests, and twine. In the prepare stage add a source_dist job that runs python3 setup.py sdist, lists the tarball, creates install.sh and unpack.sh scripts, makes them executable, and stores the dist/ directory as an artifact. In the test stage add integration_linux and integration_unix jobs that depend on source_dist, set PYTEST_ADDOPTS (and BST_FORCE_BACKEND for unix), unpack the source, install it, run pytest (as the buildstream user for linux), and publish coverage-linux/ or coverage-unix/ (and logs-unix/) as artifacts. In the coverage stage add a coverage job that depends on source_dist and both integration jobs, installs the package, combines the two .coverage files with coverage combine using .coveragerc, and reports total coverage; in the docs stage add a pages job that installs sphinx, sphinx-click, sphinx_rtd_theme>=0.4.2, the package itself, builds the docs with make -C doc, moves the HTML to public/, and publishes public/ as a pages artifact only on the master branch. Finally, add an upload job in the upload stage that depends on source_dist, runs twine upload dist/*.tar.gz, and runs only for tags matching a version pattern while excluding regular branches.
